name: Rokeach terminal values
description: Desired end states commonly associated with the Rokeach Value Survey.
citation: Rokeach, M. (1973). The Nature of Human Values. Free Press.
licenseNote: Common value labels with new paraphrases; no proprietary administration or scoring materials included.

values.name: A comfortable life
values.definition: A prosperous and materially secure life.

values.name: A sense of accomplishment
values.definition: A lasting contribution and meaningful achievement.

values.name: A world at peace
values.definition: Freedom from war and destructive conflict.

values.name: A world of beauty
values.definition: Beauty in nature and the arts.

values.name: Equality
values.definition: Equal opportunity and dignity for all.

values.name: Family security
values.definition: Safety and care for loved ones.

values.name: Salvation
values.definition: A spiritually redeemed or enduring life.

values.name: Self-respect
values.definition: A stable sense of personal worth.
